title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Manufacturing Engineer for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited:
Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited!
